task_description: Phase 77: Gemini-Omni-class Generative + Agentic 2.0. Deepen generative-media with any-to-any transforms, SynthID/C2PA provenance, object-level editing. Create quant-flow (AI filmmaking), information-agents (proactive intelligence + Universal Cart), and voice-brain-dump (transcription + auto-categorization + cross-app routing).
